creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to m.tsatsenko from comment #7)
> Created attachment 146952 [details]
> fixed python3 issue

I tested it in poudriere with jails, all py2.7, and it works fine:

http://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/databases__py-sqlalchemy-10a-1410027024.txt
http://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/databases__py-sqlalchemy-91a-1410027024.txt
http://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/databases__py-sqlalchemy-84i-1410027024.txt

I tried to build it on the host outside of poudriere and the plist
seems to be wrong. This is most probably a local issue, but if you have a hint
on why this happens, I would appreciate it.

http://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/databases__py-sqlalchemy-10a-py33-plist.txt
